subject: docs(claude): align CLAUDE.md with upstream glow-props shared patterns
body:
Systematically compared SyncTone CLAUDE.md against the full glow-props
upstream reference and applied all applicable changes to strengthen
consistency and completeness.

Changes:
- Add "Fetching This File" section with curl command for upstream reference
- Add AI Notes: GITHUB_ALL_REPO_TOKEN, discontinued repos, CRITICAL TutorialModal
- Add missing REMINDER lines for Code Standards, Prohibitions, Documentation, Triggers
- Expand Documentation section to detailed Purpose/When/What/Why format
- Separate Trigger behavior into distinct subsections (behavior + start/go)
- Extract Suggested Implementations to docs/implementations/ (8 files)
- Add Burger Menu implementation reference for ChatHeaderMenu.tsx pattern
- Clean up External Reference to avoid duplication with Fetching This File
- Update Project Structure to include docs/implementations/ directory

Tags: documentation, code-quality, cleanup, alignment
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: glow-props-alignment
Semver: patch
